query.text:
&CheckRelativeProcess;
declare @vcCode char(3), @s nvarchar(4000), @e char(6) select @vcCode = right(@stt_rec, 3)
create table #e(e char(6)) select @s = 'insert into #e select convert(varchar(6), ngay_ct, 112) from ' + case when @vcCode = 'PNA' then 'c71$000000' when @vcCode = 'PNB' then 'c72$000000' else 'c78$000000' end + ' where stt_rec = ''' + replace(@stt_rec, '''', '''''') + '''' exec sp_executesql @s select @e = e from #e
declare @td varchar(33), @field varchar(128), @join varchar(4000) select @td = case when @vcCode = 'PNG' then 'd78$' when @vcCode = 'PNB' then 'd72$' else 'd71$' end + @e select @field = 'rtrim(a.tk_vt)', @join = ''
create table #nkp(e char(6)) select stt_rec, stt_rec0, tk_vt into #nk from d74$000000
if @vcCode <> 'PNG' and not exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_compact_mode' and val = 1) begin select @s = 'if exists (select 1 from ' + replace(@td, 'd', 'm') + ' where loai_ct in(''5'', ''6'') and stt_rec = ''' + replace(@stt_rec, '''', '''''') + ''')' select @s = @s + char(13) + 'insert into #nkp select convert(char(6), ngay_ct, 112) from c74$000000 a where exists (select 1 from ' + @td + ' b where a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec_ir)' exec sp_executesql @s
select @e = min(e) from #nkp while @e is not null begin select @s = 'insert into #nk select a.stt_rec, a.stt_rec0, a.tk_vt from d74$' + @e + ' a join ' + @td + ' b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec_ir and a.stt_rec0 = b.stt_rec0ir where b.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' exec sp_executesql @s select @e = min(e) from #nkp where e > @e end
if exists (select 1 from #nk) select @field = 'isnull(rtrim(c.tk_vt), rtrim(a.tk_vt))', @join = ' left join #nk c on a.stt_rec_ir = c.stt_rec and c.stt_rec0 = a.stt_rec0ir' end
select a.*, b.volume, b.weight into #r from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt where 1 = 0 select @s = 'insert into #r (ma_vt, dvt, he_so, ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_lo, so_luong, tien0, tien3, cp, tk_vt, stt_rec_hd, stt_rec0hd, hd_so, hd_ln, stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, volume, weight, ' select @s = @s + char(13) + 'ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, ma_hd, ma_ku, so_lsx, ma_phi, ma_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct)' select @s = @s + char(13) + 'select rtrim(a.ma_vt), rtrim(a.dvt), he_so, rtrim(a.ma_kho), rtrim(a.ma_vi_tri), rtrim(a.ma_lo), a.so_luong, a.tien0, a.tien, 0, ' + @field + ', a.stt_rec, a.stt_rec0, a.so_ct, a.line_nbr, ''' + replace(@stt_rec, '''', '''''') + ''', a.stt_rec0, a.line_nbr, b.volume, b.weight, ' select @s = @s + char(13) + 'rtrim(a.ma_vv), rtrim(a.ma_sp), rtrim(ma_bp), rtrim(a.ma_hd), rtrim(a.ma_ku), rtrim(a.so_lsx), rtrim(a.ma_phi), a.ma_ct, a.so_ct, a.ngay_ct' select @s = @s + char(13) + ' from ' + @td + ' a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt ' + @join + ' where a.stt_rec = ''' + replace(@stt_rec, '''', '''''') + '''' exec sp_executesql @s select @@fieldExternal from #r a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt order by line_nbr
drop table #r drop table #e drop table #nk drop table #nkp
